calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Jan-11-2010 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Comm: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

Glen M. Nevis, Esq. appear ed for plaintiff Enterprise Rent-A-Car of San Francisco, a Nevada corporation.
Theresa Dean, Risk Manager for plaintiff, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearnce by defendant Amelia Mina, a/k/a Amelia V. Minna, a/k/a Amelia Morrisette.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on September 30, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed today, September 2, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Enterprise Rent-A-Car of San Francisco, a Nevada corporation, and against defendant Amelia Mina, a/k/a Amelia V. Minna, a/k/a Ameilia Morrisette as follows:

Principal - $6,584.92.
Interest - $504.00.
Attorney's Fees - $2,500.00.
Costs - $376.00.

Total - $9,964.92.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jan-11-2010 Assigned To Trial Court

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-30-2009 Set For Trial On Jan-11-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-13-2009 Set For Order To Show Cause On Oct-14-09 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
